meaning: n.十项运动员,十项全能选手
examples: Meanwhile, Mid-Ulster decathlete Paul Tohill bettered 7, 000 points for the first time at a meeting in California last week.
"Maybe it doesn't even mean that much to the rest of the world, " said Eaton, who eclipsed Czech decathlete Roman Sebrle's 11-year-old mark of of 9, 026 points.
